channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: H9N2 Bird Flu Hits Europe as First Human Case Confirmed in Italy - ScienceAlert
item.description:
1. H9N2 Bird Flu Hits Europe as First Human Case Confirmed in Italy  ScienceAlert
  2. Italy tracks first European human H9N2 avian flu case  CIDRAP
  3. First human case of influenza A(H9N2) infection imported in the EU  European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control
  4. Lombardy man becomes first Italian human bird flu case  ANSA
  5. Avian Flu, Falcone (Simit): "Identification of first case demonstrates screening system's capability."  lamilano.it

item.title: Psychology says the reason some people seem to barely age while others decline rapidly after 60 isn't genetic luck — it's that the ones who stay vital never let go of three things most people quietly surrender in their 50s: a reason to be somewhere, a person ex - VegOut
item.description: Psychology says the reason some people seem to barely age while others decline rapidly after 60 isn't genetic luck — it's that the ones who stay vital never let go of three things most people quietly surrender in their 50s: a reason to be somewhere, a person ex  VegOut
